name: @clearline/data-access-audit
description: Audit-log data-access layer for clearline-web: a React Query hook over the read-only GET /api/audit-log endpoint behind US-CW-021. Surfaces the 403 audit:view check as a typed error. Read-only by design — the log is append-only, so there is no mutation hook here. No UI, no business rules.

metadata.scope: Data-access lib for EPIC-CW-015 (US-CW-021 Immutable Audit Logging).
